title: View Post History
description: The system shall display a list of the user's previous posts with timestamps on their profile page.
rationale: Enabling users to view their post history allows them to track and manage their content more effectively.
business_value: Improves user satisfaction by providing transparency into past actions, facilitating better decision-making.

source.description: As a user I need to view my own post history and manage account settings (change password, email, delete account) So that I can control my account and review my posts

acceptance_criteria: The list of previous posts shall be displayed on the profile page.
Each post in the list shall include a timestamp.
Users shall have access to account settings from their profile page.
The change password option shall allow users to update their password securely.
The change email option shall allow users to update their email address and verify it.
The delete account option shall allow users to irreversible delete their account with a confirmation step.
preconditions: The user must be logged in to access the profile page.
The system must have access to the user's post history data.
The system must be able to retrieve and display data from the database.
postconditions: Users shall see a list of their previous posts with timestamps on their profile page.
User password, email, or account deletion request shall be processed securely.
The user's account information shall be updated accordingly.
functional_constraints: The system shall handle large volumes of post data without performance degradation.
Data retrieval and display operations shall be optimized for speed.
security_requirements: All password changes shall be encrypted before storage.
Email verification shall be implemented to prevent unauthorized access.
Account deletion request must require a second step for confirmation.

non_functional_requirements.performance: The system shall respond within 2 seconds to post history and account settings requests.
non_functional_requirements.availability: The system shall be available 99.9% of the time.
non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system shall support up to 10,000 users simultaneously without performance degradation.
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages shall clearly explain issues and provide actionable steps for resolution.

edge_cases: What happens when a user tries to delete their account and later decides not to?
How does the system handle concurrent updates to a user's account settings?
dependencies: Database for storing user post history and account information
Authentication service for verifying user credentials

interfaces.name: User Profile API
interfaces.description: Provides endpoints for retrieving a user's post history and accessing account settings.

interfaces.name: Post History Database
interfaces.description: Stores the user's posts along with timestamps.

test_cases.description: Verify that a user can view their post history after logging in.
test_cases.expected_result: The system displays a list of the user's previous posts with timestamps on their profile page.

test_cases.description: Test changing the password through the account settings.
test_cases.expected_result: The user's password is updated securely, and they are prompted to verify the new password.

test_cases.description: Verify that deleting an account requires a second step for confirmation.
test_cases.expected_result: The system prompts the user for confirmation before deleting their account, and the account is deleted only upon successful confirmation.
